name: emit_year_match case 6: multi-year year_default with range year_offset uses IN not BETWEEN
description: Verifies that a source with a multi-year year_default joined with a range year_offset emits an IN(...) predicate enumerating the cross-product rather than an over-inclusive BETWEEN. year=[2022,2023] + year_offset=[1,2] should produce IN(2023,2024,2025).
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(player_adp_index.adp) FROM player_adp_index WHERE player_adp_index.pid = player.pid AND player_adp_index.year IN (2023,2024,2025) AND player_adp_index.source_id IN ('SLEEPER') AND player_adp_index.adp_type IN ('PPR_REDRAFT')) AS "adp_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_adp_index" as "t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f" on "t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f"."adp_type" in ('PPR_REDRAFT') where player.pos IN ('QB') and t6ff56cb89c37c5a5c611dbec0907b26f.adp >= '10' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
